summary: iOS 👀 Free60+/20 | Image missing on Home Screen
scenario: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen on Free60+ and Free20 devices, with no placeholder on builds 32 & 46 and duplicate placeholders on production.
description_clean: Headset image is missing from the Home Screen on Free60+ and Free20 devices. No placeholder image is displayed on build 32 & 46, while on the production app two placeholder images appear side by side instead of the headset image.
steps: Open the app on a Free60+ or Free20 device.
Observe the area where the headset image should be displayed.
expected: A headset image (or at least a placeholder) should be displayed on the Home Screen.
actual: On build 32 & 46, no placeholder image is shown. On the production app, two placeholder images appear side by side instead of the headset image.
